design_philosophy.visual_style: High-Contrast Dark Mode with Magical Glows
design_philosophy.texture_strategy: Subtle noise overlays + Glassmorphism to simulate crystal/obsidian surfaces

cards.default: bg-card/40 backdrop-blur-md border border-border shadow-lg rounded-xl transition-all duration-300 hover:border-primary/50 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(124,58,237,0.2)]

buttons.primary: bg-primary hover:bg-primary/90 text-white shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(124,58,237,0.5)] transition-all hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(124,58,237,0.7)] font-cinzel tracking-wider uppercase
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary/50 hover:bg-secondary/80 border border-border text-foreground backdrop-blur-sm

inputs.default: bg-black/20 border-border focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 transition-all font-mono

modals.content: bg-[#0a0a2e] border border-primary/30 shadow-[0_0_50px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] p-6 rounded-2xl

images.description: Ruins near trees with fog - Use for Landing Page Hero Background with heavy dark overlay
Close up metal dice - Use for Dice Roller section background
Foggy forest - Use for Combat Tracker subtle background

universal_guidelines: FORCE DARK MODE: The app must effectively be in dark mode at all times.
NO DEFAULT SCROLLBARS: Use the custom 'thin' scrollbar style.
TEXT CONTRAST: Ensure generic gray text is at least slate-400 for readability against dark backgrounds.
MICRO-INTERACTIONS: Every button press must have a scale down effect (active:scale-95).
DATA-TESTID: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
instructions_to_main_agent: REFACTOR: The 'App.css' file contains legacy custom CSS. Migrate these styles to Tailwind utility classes in the components themselves.
INSTALL FONTS: Install '@fontsource/cinzel' and '@fontsource/manrope' via npm/yarn.
CONFIG UPDATE: Update 'tailwind.config.js' to include the new colors and font families.
CLEANUP: Remove the 'glow-panel', 'medieval-heading', and other custom classes from App.css after migrating them to Tailwind.
